title: Candidate Solution
description: A machine-generated option evaluated against a defined objective and its constraints.

id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate solution.

run_id.description: Identifier of the run that generated this candidate.

domain_id.description: Domain this candidate was generated for.

objective_id.description: Objective this candidate was generated to satisfy.

constraints_id.description: Constraints document applied to this candidate.

content_ref.description: Reference to the candidate content artifact.

generation_metadata_ref.description: Reference to generation metadata (adapter, model, prompt).

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state of this candidate.

evaluation_results_ref.description: References to evaluation result records for this candidate.

governance_results_ref.description: References to governance result records for this candidate.
